citation: Restatement (Third) of Torts: Apportionment of Liability § 22
note: General framework for contractual indemnity between parties.
Limits indemnification for a party's own negligence in construction contracts, a common target of overly broad indemnity language.

citation: Restatement (Third) of Torts: Apportionment of Liability § 22 cmt. b
note: Reciprocal indemnities are a common risk-balancing mechanism.

citation: Crawford v. Weather Shield Mfg., Inc., 44 Cal. 4th 541 (2008)
note: California case establishing that a duty to defend can be immediate upon tender of a claim, independent of the duty to indemnify.
Public policy limits on terms exempting a party from liability, relevant when drafting indemnity exclusions.
